items.promptRaw: En cas du brouillard épais, la visibilité est faible. Lorsqu'il est difficile de circuler, il faut____.

B Turn on the surrounding lights, fog light, and drive along the right side.
C Turn on the hazard lights and the fog light and stop in a safe place
D Turn on the hazard lights and keep driving

B Turn on the surrounding lights, fog light, and drive along the right side.
C Turn on the hazard lights and the fog light and stop in a safe place
